name: Burgundy Meatloaf in Sourdough
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a thin slice from the top of the loaf.
2. Scoop out most of the bread, reserving the top slice and any remaining crumbs for other recipes.
3. Brown onion and mushrooms in 1 1/2 tablespoons butter.
4. Beat egg with catsup.
5. Mix in bread crumbs, half a cup of cheese, red wine, and seasonings.
6. Lightly mix in ground beef and onion mixture.
7. Spoon meat mixture into the hollowed-out bread.
8. Rub the crust with the remaining 1/2 tablespoon butter.
9. Wrap in foil.
10. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour to 1 1/4 hours.
11. Remove foil, sprinkle with the remaining half cup of cheese.
12. Return loaf to oven and bake until cheese melts, about 3 minutes.
13. Cut into 1-inch slices.
